task_completion.description: Import Suppliers, Products, and Order_Details CSV files into Power BI
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Data/Fields pane on the right side of the Power BI interface shows tables named 'Suppliers', 'Products', and 'Order_Details'.

task_completion.description: Configure data model relationships between the tables
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Model view, there are relationship lines connecting the 'Suppliers' table to the 'Products' table, and the 'Products' table to the 'Order_Details' table.
A measure named 'Total_Order_Value' is visible in the Data pane (indicated by a calculator icon) or its DAX formula is visible in the formula bar.

task_completion.description: Rename the report page to 'Supplier Performance'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The page tab at the bottom of the report canvas is named 'Supplier Performance'.

task_completion.description: Create a Treemap visual showing Total_Order_Value by Country and CompanyName
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Treemap visual is present on the report canvas, with its fields configured to use 'Country', 'CompanyName', and 'Total_Order_Value'.

task_completion.description: Create a Table visual showing CompanyName, Country, and Total_Order_Value
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Table visual is present on the report canvas displaying columns for 'CompanyName', 'Country', and 'Total_Order_Value'.

task_completion.description: Save the report as 'Supplier_Performance.pbix' on the Desktop
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Power BI window title bar displays 'Supplier_Performance - Power BI Desktop', or the file 'Supplier_Performance.pbix' is visible on the Desktop.

integrity.description: Agent used the Power BI Desktop GUI to build the report
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking through Power BI menus, dragging fields, and interacting with the visual builder rather than using automated scripts.

integrity.description: Visuals are genuinely created in Power BI
integrity.visual_evidence: The visuals are interactive elements on the Power BI canvas with appropriate formatting and field wells populated, not pasted images.

integrity.description: Agent did not mock the .pbix file using a text editor
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen saving the file directly from Power BI Desktop via the File > Save or Save As dialog.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output file is 'C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\Supplier_Performance.pbix'. The required measure must be named 'Total_Order_Value'. The report page must be named 'Supplier Performance'. The passing score threshold for this task is 70 points.
